title: 3 Stocks to Hold Right Through the Next Market Downturn (and Maybe Even Add to)
text: These stocks should help you sleep soundly during the next stock market storm.

title: How Are Utility ETFs Reacting to Decent Q4 Earnings Results?
text: Let's take a look at some big utility earnings releases and see if these can leave an impact on ETFs exposed to the space.

title: Dominion Energy reports Q4 results: here's what you should know

title: Dominion Energy To Sell West Virginia Natural Gas Utility 'DEWV' To Ullico For $690M
text: Dominion Energy Inc (NYSE: D) has agreed to sell its West Virginia natural gas utility, Hope Gas, Inc. (Dominion Energy West Virginia or DEWV), to Ullico Inc.'s infrastructure fund, for $690 million. Ullico's infrastructure business plans to integrate DEWV with its portfolio company, Hearthstone Utilities Inc. As part of the agreement, Hearthstone agreed to move its headquarters to West Virginia.

title: Dominion Energy (D) Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Top
text: Dominion Energy's (D) fourth-quarter earnings are on par with estimates. D plans to invest $37 billion in the 2022-2026 time frame, with 87% of the expenditure directed toward emission reduction.

title: Dominion Energy Agrees to Sell West Virginia Natural Gas Distribution Company to Ullico
text: RICHMOND, Va., Feb. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) today announced that it has executed a definitive agreement to sell its West Virginia natural gas utility – Hope Gas, Inc. (Dominion Energy West Virginia or DEWV) – to Ullico Inc.'s infrastructure fund for $690 million.

title: Dominion Energy Broadens Net Zero Commitments
text: RICHMOND, Va., Feb. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As one of the nation's leading clean-energy companies, Dominion Energy is broadening efforts to limit greenhouse gas emissions.

title: Dominion Energy Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings
text: RICHMOND, Va., Feb. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) today announced an unaudited net income determined in accordance with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (reported earnings) for the three months ended Dec. 31, 2021, of $1.3 billion ($1.63 per share) compared with a net gain of $682 million ($0.82 per share) for the same period in 2020.

title: Is a Surprise Coming for Dominion Energy (D) This Earnings Season?

title: 4 Utility Stocks Set to Surpass Q4 Earnings Estimates

title: Dominion Energy (D) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: Dominion Energy (D) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
